title: ScoutFlow preview-only operator flow for a Bilibili workflow note
source_summary: A metadata-only capture shows a Bilibili workflow clip about keeping evidence first and avoiding premature promotion. The operator should stay inside preview-only posture while still being able to scan the eventual note shape.
key_points: manual_url discover and metadata_fetch are separate truths
trust trace should expose blocked and degraded states before graph polish
vault surfaces can be visible without implying committed success
transcript_backed_details: The transcript-backed section highlights the speaker's repeated emphasis on evidence first, narrow write scope, and operator-visible holds before any runtime tool is approved.
trust_evidence_notes: This rewrite stays bounded to safe parsed fields, trust-trace readback, and preview-only vault posture. No runtime transcript execution, no true write, and no migration cues are introduced.
follow_up_questions: Which metadata fields should remain preview-only until runtime tools are explicitly approved?
What extra evidence should be visible before a future rewrite surface can leave blocked posture?
